results.title: Reducers — Stainless Products, LLC
results.snippet: Reducers are designed to change a pipe's diameter and are typically concentric or eccentric. Stainless Products reducers are manufactured to the precise diameter and wall thickness you need in 316L stainless steel and 32RA polish on both the ID and OD. Other finishes can be supplied upon request.
